name: Storyboard Pack
tagline: Any story → scene stills + image-to-video prompts
description: Turn your own story or script into numbered scene stills and motion prompts you can batch into Kling, Seedance, Wan, or any image-to-video tool. Bring your cast — we keep looks consistent.
thumbnail_style: YouTube thumbnail for an animated story channel: bold emotional character faces filling the frame, cinematic lighting matching the episode mood, oversized bold title text with thick outline, clean 16:9, high click appeal, no watermark, no logos
example_topics: Two friends get lost on the way to a festival
A quiet inventor builds a machine that talks back
Siblings race to fix a mistake before sunset
